library: Thomas Fisher Rare Book Library, University of Toronto
library_raw: Thomas Fisher Rare Book Library, University of Toronto
collection: Friedberg, Thomas Fisher Rare Book Library, University of Toronto
description: Fol. 7v: Fragment (9 lines) from an unusual state document. Mentions the caliph (al-ḥaḍra al-ṭāhira) and contains many Greek/Coptic numerals, which is atypical for fiscal documents. Shows signs of having been used in a book binding. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בThomas Fisher Rare Book Library, University of Toronto.
